blocks.content: The house was quiet when I got in. Mr. Cole's car was in the drive. Larry Jr. was on the couch with his shoes still on.

Daniel Snyder happened. A senior girl's eyes in a hallway happened. Maya happened. Jonathan taking up every room he walked into happened. A thousand things happened and none of them were finished yet.
He went back to the TV. No follow-up. He just needed to know something happened — not the whole story. I don't know why that's the thing that settled me, but it was.

blocks.speaker: Mr. Cole
blocks.content: Food's in the fridge when you're ready.
He didn't ask about the day. Mr. Cole never asks. He handles the practical things and waits for the rest to arrive on its own time.
I ate standing at the kitchen counter and went upstairs.
